mechanism_narrative: A persistently low unemployment rate signals a robust labor market and strong consumer confidence, which underpins corporate earnings growth and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are not positively correlated with UNRATE remaining below 5.0% over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises above a certain threshold, it indicates a restrictive monetary policy stance, which typically tightens financial conditions and dampens economic growth, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in more than 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS has exceeded 5.0% for at least two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Robust retail sales combined with a low unemployment rate signifies strong consumer demand and a healthy economy, which directly translates into higher corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term between positive RSAFS growth and UNRATE below 5.0% does not show a statistically significant positive correlation with SPX 20d returns.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating GDP growth, especially when accompanied by strong industrial production, indicates a broad-based economic expansion that boosts corporate profits and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 annualized growth > 3.0% AND INDPRO 3-month change > 0.5%
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative in more than 30% of periods where both GDPC1 and INDPRO growth conditions are met.

mechanism_narrative: A significant and sustained decline in industrial production signals a contraction in manufacturing and broader economic activity, leading to reduced corporate earnings expectations and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in more than 40% of instances following a 3-month decline in INDPRO exceeding 1.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent and elevated inflation erodes corporate profit margins and increases the cost of capital, leading to a re-evaluation of equity valuations downwards and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns show no significant negative correlation with CPIAUCSL growth exceeding 3% year-over-year over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts indicates renewed confidence in the economy and future demand, often preceding broader economic expansion and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over a short horizon.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are not significantly positive in periods where HOUST exceeds 1500.0 during identified economic recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Strong job creation (PAYEMS) combined with robust retail sales (RSAFS) indicates a healthy consumer base with increasing purchasing power, driving corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are not consistently positive when both PAYEMS and RSAFS show strong growth over a 3-month period, as defined by the trigger.
